race.comment: IDLE FLYER (6) won the G3 Angst in the Spring and steps up to her right trip with her excellent second-up credentials. Sat just off the fast tempo on her return when she held her ground to run fourth over 1200m in the G3 Wenona Girl at Randwick. Ticks plenty of boxes with the good speed and will prove hard to stop. TUILERIES (5) eye-catching run first-up, then strode forward from the wide draw to score a tough win in the G3 Newcastle Stakes over 1400m. Can get the trip from the soft gate. ARCTIC GLAMOUR (1) raced much closer to the speed with a narrow second over 1500m in the G1 Coolmore Classic at this track second-up. Classy mare who can finish over the top of these. MODELLA (13) gave away a big start when she rounded them up to win with ridiculous ease over 1400m at this track in BM 88 grade. Has come back a much stronger mare and looks up to winning a race of this calibre. SHOHISHA (7) disappointing run in the Coolmore and worth another chance with the key jockey change.
